---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a reproducible bug
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear description of the bug. What did you expect to happen, and what actually happened?

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Drop / select file '...'
3. Click '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

What should have happened?

## Actual Behavior

What happened instead? Include any error messages from the browser console.

## Environment

- **Browser**: (e.g. Chrome 123, Safari 17, Firefox 124)
- **OS**: (e.g. macOS 15, Windows 11, Ubuntu 24)
- **Input file type(s)**: (e.g. PNG, JPEG, AVIF)
- **Input file size(s)**: (e.g. 4 MB)
- **Number of files**: (e.g. 12)

## Console Output

Paste any relevant output from the browser developer console (F12 > Console tab).

```
paste here
```

## Additional Context

Any other information that might help diagnose the issue.
